title: Max Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)

jsonLd.title: Max Healthcare is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Principal)
jsonLd.description:
We at Max Healthcare are looking for an experienced Consultant Physician based out of Chandigarh. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Max Healthcare:
Max Healthcare is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Conduct routine health assessments and screenings
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Diagnose and treat medical conditions following established protocols
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in BLS/ACLS
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Learning & development budget
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Max Healthcare!
